pass1_value.note: The create-app guide shows developers can sign in to the developer portal, create an app, and receive a Client ID and Client Secret from the dashboard (no human approval required to obtain credentials).

final_value.note: Xero’s official 'Create an app' guide describes signing in to the developer portal and creating an app to obtain credentials (client id/secret) via the portal, indicating self-serve credential creation.

pass1_value.note: Public docs describe REST APIs and OAuth2 flows and developers can self-register an app to get client credentials, so integrations can be developed today.

final_value.note: Xero’s official API documentation describes publicly available APIs and how to use them; combined with the ability to create an app in the developer portal to obtain credentials, integrations can be built and tested today using the documented API surface.
